title: Glasgow traffic: 'Heavy congestion' on M77, M74 and the M8 as drivers face rush hour delays

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
Glasgow traffic: 'Heavy congestion' on M77, M74 and the M8 as drivers face rush hour delays.

Several roads are seeing increased levels of traffic as travel disruption in the city continues.
